privacy_local: You are using a local model. Nobody can see what you do.
privacy_openrouter: You are using an OpenRouter cloud model. OpenRouter and your nerd friend can see what you do.
privacy_venice: You are using a Venice cloud model. Nobody (including your nerd friend) can see what you do.
no_model_description: You need to download an AI model before you can start chatting. It only takes a minute.
waking_up_hint: Cloud AIs can take 1–5 minutes to start. They also fall asleep after 5 minutes of inactivity.
slow_device_warning: Your device appears quite slow. We recommend downloading the Desktop app for better performance.
offline_cloud_message: You're offline — cloud models need an internet connection
image_requires_vision: Image input requires vision model support (coming soon)
unsupported_file_type: This file type is not supported
